about_me.title: About me
about_me.description: I absolutely love programming! It's a playground for building always something new. I started teaching myself code in high school, kept going through university while getting my math degree, then decided to also study computer science. Now it's not just a hobby - it's my job too.

sibill.description: Full-stack developer for B2B platform. I develop both back-end and front-end of the platform collaborating with product managers and designers. I prefer agile methodologies, close-knit teams and frequent communication.

argo.description: Computer Vision expert: designing, prototyping and implementing advanced algorithms. I led development of the proprietary C++ library, with performance optimization for ARM devices, smartphones and x86.

computer_science.title: Computer science
computer_science.description: I really enjoy staying current with new technologies that emerge every day. I often attend meetups including JVM User Group, XP User Group, Rust Milano and Opensource Saturday.

bike.title: Bike
bike.description: My bicycle is my main mode of transportation for urban travel and excursions

food.title: Food
food.description: I believe that eating is one of life's greatest pleasures. Cooking allows me to combine ingredients in creative ways, giving life to dishes that are greater than the sum of their parts.
